desc_app_ui_language: Interface display language. Text updates immediately after switching.
desc_app_theme: UI theme. Supports Light, Dark, Gray, Ocean, Forest, Sunset, Rose, and Follow System.
desc_cli_verbose:
Output detailed debug info to logs for troubleshooting.

When enabled, Qt UI writes these items under result/:
- log_timestamp.txt: Qt UI runtime log
- timestamp-image-target-translator/: debug intermediate files for a single task

Cleanup: close Qt UI first, then delete the unneeded log_*.txt files and matching timestamp debug folders under result/.
desc_cli_ignore_errors: Ignore errors and continue processing remaining images without interrupting the task.
desc_cli_use_gpu: Enable GPU acceleration. Requires CUDA support, significantly speeds up processing.
desc_cli_disable_onnx_gpu: Disable ONNX Runtime GPU acceleration. Try enabling this if GPU mode has compatibility issues.
desc_cli_format: Output image format. Choose PNG, JPEG, WEBP, or leave empty to keep original format.
desc_cli_overwrite: Overwrite existing translated files. When disabled, already translated images are skipped.
desc_cli_skip_no_text: Skip images with no detected text to reduce unnecessary processing.
desc_cli_save_text: Save translation results to JSON file for later editing in the editor.
desc_cli_save_quality: JPEG/WEBP save quality (0-100). Higher values mean better quality but larger files.
desc_cli_batch_size: Number of images sent to the translator at once (default 3). Larger values are faster but increase difficulty, slower responses, and more errors. Recommended 1-10.
desc_cli_batch_concurrent: Enable batch concurrent processing for faster multi-image translation.
desc_cli_save_to_source_dir: Output translations to manga_translator_work/result/ subdirectory in the source image directory.
desc_cli_export_editable_psd: Export layered PSD files. Photoshop is required. The export includes the original image, inpainted image, and editable text layers, and is written to manga_translator_work/psd/ next to the source image.
desc_cli_psd_font: Set the default font used for text layers in Photoshop. Supports either the Photoshop display name or the PostScript name. Leave empty to use Photoshop's default font.
desc_cli_psd_script_only: Only generate the .jsx script. Photoshop will not be started automatically, and no PSD will be generated directly. The script is saved to manga_translator_work/psd/ next to the source image for manual review or execution.
desc_app_unload_models_after_translation: Unload all models after translation to free VRAM and memory. Good for low VRAM, but requires reloading for next translation.
desc_cli_attempts: Retry count when an API call fails. Set to -1 for unlimited retries.
desc_cli_context_size: Translation context page count for multi-page joint translation. Larger values improve quality but consume more tokens.
desc_ocr_ocr: OCR recognition model. 32px: legacy lightweight model, useful as a compatibility fallback. 48px: default recommendation with a good speed/accuracy balance. 48px_ctc: CTC variant of 48px for comparison. mocr: Manga OCR model, especially suitable for Japanese manga. paddleocr: general multilingual model. paddleocr_korean / paddleocr_latin / paddleocr_thai: best suited for Korean, Latin-script text, and Thai; for English, paddleocr_latin is recommended. paddleocr_vl: general-purpose model with the best accuracy but the highest resource usage; when using it, select the matching language in the PaddleOCR-VL Language Hint below or provide a PaddleOCR-VL Custom Prompt. openai_ocr: OCR through an OpenAI-compatible multimodal API. gemini_ocr: OCR through Gemini multimodal API. Both require the corresponding API Key in API Keys (.env), otherwise the UI will block translation start; they often give the best results, but the gap versus local OCR is usually not large, and they consume a lot of request counts because they run per text box, so they are not recommended on providers that charge per request. Google Cloud or Vertex-related API keys can also be entered directly in the Gemini fields; keep the default official Base URL unchanged. If hybrid OCR is enabled, the recommended Japanese manga combo is 48px + mocr.
desc_ocr_use_hybrid_ocr: Use two OCR models simultaneously, taking the best result to improve accuracy. Recommended combo for Japanese manga: 48px + mocr.
desc_ocr_secondary_ocr: Second OCR model used in hybrid OCR mode. For Japanese manga, mocr is recommended when the primary OCR is 48px. If you choose openai_ocr or gemini_ocr here, the corresponding API Key in API Keys (.env) is also required, otherwise the UI will block translation start.
desc_ocr_ocr_vl_language_hint: Language hint for PaddleOCR-VL to help recognize text in the specified language more accurately.
desc_ocr_ocr_vl_custom_prompt: Custom prompt for PaddleOCR-VL (overrides default). Example: OCR: Extract all Arabic text.
desc_ocr_ai_ocr_prompt_path: Fixed YAML prompt file used by OpenAI OCR and Gemini OCR. Click Edit to modify it directly.
desc_ocr_ai_ocr_concurrency: Maximum concurrent API requests for OpenAI OCR and Gemini OCR. Set 1 for serial processing, 2 or higher to process multiple text boxes at the same time.
desc_ocr_ai_ocr_custom_prompt: Custom prompt for OpenAI OCR and Gemini OCR. Leave empty to use the built-in default prompt that returns only recognized text with line breaks preserved.
desc_colorizer_ai_colorizer_prompt_path: Fixed YAML prompt file used by OpenAI Colorizer and Gemini Colorizer. Click Edit to modify it directly.
desc_colorizer_ai_colorizer_history_page: Automatically attaches the previous already-colorized pages as reference images for the current AI colorization request. This is image-only context, not text. Set 0 to disable.
desc_render_ai_renderer_prompt_path: Fixed YAML prompt file used by OpenAI Renderer and Gemini Renderer. The final request is combined with numbered boxes and translated text for each region.
desc_render_ai_renderer_concurrency: Maximum concurrent API requests for OpenAI Renderer and Gemini Renderer. This limits how many pages can be rendered at the same time during batch processing.
desc_ocr_use_model_bubble_filter: Enable model bubble filtering. Uses AI to determine if text is inside speech bubbles to filter non-dialogue text.
desc_ocr_min_text_length: Minimum text length. Filters out recognized text regions shorter than this value.
desc_ocr_ignore_bubble: Smart filter for non-bubble text (0-1). 0=disabled, 0.3=loose, 0.7=strict. Judges by edge black/white ratio.
desc_ocr_merge_special_require_full_wrap: Model-assisted merging: can improve text box merging to some extent. When enabled, performs model-assisted pre-merging; unlabeled boxes must be fully wrapped to participate.
desc_ocr_model_bubble_overlap_threshold: Model bubble overlap threshold, controls bubble detection box overlap judgment.
desc_filter_text_enabled: Enable filter list. Text regions containing filter words in OCR results will be completely skipped.
desc_ocr_prob: OCR recognition probability threshold (0-1). Text below this value is filtered out.
desc_ocr_merge_gamma: Distance tolerance for text region merging. Larger values merge more distant text boxes.
desc_ocr_merge_sigma: Outlier tolerance for text region merging. Controls merging degree of outlier text.
desc_ocr_merge_edge_ratio_threshold: Edge ratio threshold, controls merging conditions for edge text.
desc_detector_detector: Text detection algorithm. default uses DBNet+ResNet34; ctd is manga-specific; craft is general text detection.
desc_detector_import_yolo_labels: Read YOLO annotation files with the same filename from manga_translator_work/yolo_labels. Depending on the active workflow, the imported boxes are used to replace text boxes or regenerate masks.
desc_detector_use_yolo_obb: Use YOLO oriented bounding boxes for assisted detection, improving text detection accuracy.
desc_detector_min_box_area_ratio: Minimum detection box area ratio (relative to total image pixels). Filters out too-small boxes. Recommended 0.0005-0.002.
desc_detector_detection_size: Image scaling size for detection. Default 2048, larger is more accurate but slower.
desc_detector_text_threshold: Text detection confidence threshold (0-1). Higher is stricter, may miss text.
desc_detector_box_threshold: Text box generation confidence threshold. Lower values detect more text boxes.
desc_detector_unclip_ratio: Unclip ratio, controls text box expansion. Larger values make bigger boxes.
desc_detector_yolo_obb_conf: YOLO assisted detection confidence threshold. Higher is stricter.
desc_detector_yolo_obb_overlap_threshold: YOLO box overlap threshold for removing overlapping detection boxes.
desc_translator_translator: Choose the translation engine. The current Qt UI offers OpenAI, Google Gemini, Sakura, High-Quality OpenAI, High-Quality Gemini, plus No Translation and Keep Original. High-Quality OpenAI is recommended.
desc_translator_target_lang: Target language for translation. Supports Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, etc.
desc_translator_keep_lang: After text regions are merged and before translation starts, keep only regions detected as this source language. Set this to No Filter to disable the feature.
desc_translator_enable_streaming: When enabled, supported OpenAI/Gemini translators, including HQ modes, prefer the unified streaming transport for incremental responses. When disabled, they always use standard non-streaming requests.
desc_translator_no_text_lang_skip: Do not skip text already in the target language, force translation.
desc_translator_extract_glossary: Auto-extract proper nouns (names, places) from translations to ensure consistency in long manga series.
desc_translator_max_requests_per_minute: Maximum requests per minute. Set to 0 for no limit. Used to avoid API rate limits.
desc_translator_remove_trailing_period: When the source text has no ending punctuation, automatically remove an extra sentence-final period added to the translation (such as 。, . or ．).
desc_translator_use_custom_api_params: Read custom parameters from examples/custom_api_params.json and pass them to enabled AI APIs. Applies to translation, AI OCR, AI rendering, and AI colorization.
desc_use_custom_api_params: Read custom parameters from examples/custom_api_params.json and pass them to enabled AI APIs. Applies to translation, AI OCR, AI rendering, and AI colorization.
desc_inpainter_inpainter: Image inpainting algorithm. lama_large has best quality (recommended); lama_mpe is fast; default uses AOT.
desc_mask_dilation_offset: Mask dilation offset (default 70). Controls text erasure area expansion, larger values erase wider areas.
desc_ocr_limit_mask_dilation_to_bubble_m: Limit mask dilation to within bubble area, preventing bubble borders from being accidentally erased.
desc_ocr_use_model_bubble_repair_interse: Intersect model bubble area with repair mask for precise repair range control.
desc_inpainter_inpainting_size: Image size for inpainting. Larger is better quality but slower.
desc_inpainter_inpainting_precision: Inpainting precision. fp32 is most accurate but slowest; fp16 is balanced; bf16 recommended.
desc_kernel_size: Text erasure kernel size (default 3). Controls text erasure precision.
desc_inpainter_force_use_torch_inpaintin: Force PyTorch engine for inpainting (default CPU uses ONNX). Use when ONNX has issues.
desc_render_renderer: Rendering engine. default renderer; openai_renderer and gemini_renderer require the corresponding API Key in API Keys (.env), otherwise the UI will block translation start. Google Cloud or Vertex-related API keys can also be entered directly in the Gemini fields; keep the default official Base URL unchanged.
desc_render_alignment: Text alignment. auto detects automatically; left/center/right for specific alignment.
desc_render_disable_font_border: Disable font stroke effect (remove text borders).
desc_render_font_size_offset: Font size offset. Positive increases font, negative decreases.
desc_render_font_size_minimum: Minimum font size limit, prevents text from being too small to read.
desc_render_direction: Text direction. auto detects automatically; horizontal/vertical for specific direction.
desc_render_uppercase: Convert all text to uppercase letters.
desc_render_lowercase: Convert all text to lowercase letters.
desc_render_font_color: Font color using hex code (e.g. #FFFFFF). Leave empty for auto-detection.
desc_render_line_spacing: Line spacing multiplier (default 1.0). Adjusts gap between lines, range 0.1-5.0.
desc_render_letter_spacing: Letter spacing multiplier (default 1.0). Adjusts glyph advance distance, range 0.1-5.0.
desc_render_font_size: Fixed font size, overrides auto-calculation. Leave empty for auto size.
desc_render_auto_rotate_symbols: Auto-rotate symbols in vertical text (e.g. ！？) for correct display.
desc_render_rtl: Enable right-to-left (RTL) layout for Arabic, Hebrew, etc.
desc_render_layout_mode: Layout mode. smart_scaling is Smart Scaling; strict is Strict Boundary; balloon_fill is Smart Bubble (recommended).
desc_render_center_text_in_bubble: Center text blocks within speech bubbles.
desc_render_disable_auto_wrap: Disable auto line wrapping. Recommended when AI line breaking is enabled.
desc_render_optimize_line_breaks: AI line break optimization: auto-adjusts font size to reduce unnecessary breaks, improving readability. Requires OpenAI/Gemini translator.
desc_render_check_br_and_retry: Check AI line break results, auto-retry if unsatisfactory. ⚠️ Warning: May cause infinite loops, use with caution.
desc_render_strict_smart_scaling: Strict smart scaling: AI line breaking without expanding text boxes, only shrinks font to fit.
desc_render_stroke_width: Font stroke width ratio (default 0.07). Relative to font size, range 0.0-1.0. Set to 0 to disable stroke.
desc_render_enable_template_alignment: Direct paste mode: crop regions from translated image and paste to raw image by coordinate matching, preserving original font style. Only works in Replace Translation mode.
desc_render_paste_mask_dilation_pixels: Pixels to expand mask area before pasting (default 10). Set to 0 to disable dilation.
desc_upscale_upscaler: Super-resolution model. waifu2x default; realcugan recommended; mangajanai ⭐ best quality but most resource-intensive.
desc_upscale_upscale_ratio: Super-resolution scale factor. Not used = no upscaling; 2/3/4 = scale by corresponding factor.
desc_upscale_tile_size: Tile processing size (0=no tiling). Splits large images into tiles to reduce VRAM usage. Recommended 200-800.
desc_upscale_revert_upscaling: Revert to original resolution after translation to prevent output images from becoming larger.
desc_colorizer_colorizer: Colorizer type. none = no colorization. openai_colorizer and gemini_colorizer require the corresponding API Key in API Keys (.env), otherwise the UI will block translation start. Google Cloud or Vertex-related API keys can also be entered directly in the Gemini fields; keep the default official Base URL unchanged.
desc_colorizer_colorization_size: Colorization processing size. Larger is better quality but slower.
desc_colorizer_denoise_sigma: Denoise strength, controls denoising after colorization.
desc_cli_enable_post_translation_check: Enable post-translation quality check, auto-detect and retry unsatisfactory translations.
desc_cli_post_check_max_retry_attempts: Maximum retry attempts for translation quality check.
desc_cli_post_check_repetition_threshold: Repetition detection threshold for judging repeated content in translations.
desc_cli_post_check_target_lang_threshol: Target language ratio threshold for judging translation quality.

Skip only when OCR text exactly matches: Skip only when OCR text exactly matches one of these rules.
